findings.location: s7 (LIKE検索を簡易的に実装出来る機能)
findings.description: Source explicitly lists as a third bullet point feature: 「Javaの実装は、db-feature-5-label 機能と同様に、オブジェクトのフィールドの値を条件に設定できる。」 The knowledge file omits this stated capability. The code example shows `st.retrieve(entity)` which implies object usage, but the explicit statement that object field values can be used as LIKE conditions (same as the object registration feature) is not present as a feature description.
findings.source_evidence: * Javaの実装は、 :ref:`db-feature-5-label` 機能と同様に、オブジェクトのフィールドの値を条件に設定できる。
